final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original fantasy illustration of a dragon and knight in epic combat, set against a burning castle and storm-lit sky.

Style/medium: digital fantasy illustration, painterly epic style in the spirit of Frank Frazetta and Greg Rutkowski — bold brushwork, dramatic scale contrast
Composition: wide dynamic shot, low-angle perspective emphasizing the dragon's massive scale, knight charging from lower-left toward center frame, diagonal tension lines driving the eye upward
Subject: colossal dragon exhaling a torrent of fire downward, scales glistening with heat; armored knight charging with shield raised and weapon drawn, silhouetted against the flames
Scene/backdrop: crumbling burning castle engulfed in orange fire and black smoke in the background, storm sky with multiple lightning bolts splitting dark thunderclouds overhead
Lighting/mood: dual-source dramatic lighting — fierce orange-red fire glow from below, cold blue-white lightning flash from above; epic, tense, kinetic atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal and storm-grey sky as base, molten orange and crimson fire as dominant accent, cold electric blue lightning as contrast, knight's steel armor catching both light sources
Materials/textures: dragon's rough overlapping scales with ember glow at edges, knight's dented battle-worn plate armor, cracked stone castle walls with fire licking through gaps
Avoid: soft pastel tones, static poses, symmetrical composition, cartoonish proportions, watermark, flat shading
